FFlagFlyoutHideFriendsHeader_Staged.mechanism: Modifies the user interface to hide the friends header in certain menus.
FFlagFlyoutHideFriendsHeader_Staged.purpose: Creates a cleaner and less cluttered interface for players.

FFlagMergeImpressionsViewportCalculation.mechanism: Combines calculations for how players view content to optimize rendering.
FFlagMergeImpressionsViewportCalculation.purpose: Improves visual performance and loading times for players in games.

DFFlagAdditionalFontChecks.mechanism: Adds extra validation for fonts used in games to ensure compatibility.
DFFlagAdditionalFontChecks.purpose: Ensures text displays correctly, enhancing readability for players.

DFFlagBtfUseAssetRequest_Staged.mechanism: Enables a new method for requesting assets from the server.
DFFlagBtfUseAssetRequest_Staged.purpose: Improves the speed and reliability of loading game assets for players.

DFIntMigrateTriangleMeshPartTestScale.mechanism: Adjusts the scale of triangle mesh parts in the game engine.
DFIntMigrateTriangleMeshPartTestScale.purpose: Enhances the visual quality and performance of 3D models for players.
